entries.text: Bot received unexplained SIGTERM at ~4am causing double restart — likely macOS system maintenance or launchd session cycling. Not caused by bot code. Also nightly git push failing due to .gitignore conflict with credential files.
Oura fix: removed silent fallback to stale data in oura.js, moved sleep briefing from 7:30 to 7:45am to give Oura API more processing time. Both changes need restart.
KS wants Granola meeting summaries as one paragraph only, no citation links. Keep it clean and concise.
KS had a smoothie before polo today — helped with energy and avoided Mounjaro-related nausea. Good pre-polo fueling strategy during adjustment period.
Mounjaro week 2 check-in: appetite noticeably reduced, planning next dose tonight (Sunday). Only side effect so far is exercise nausea, managed by pre-polo smoothie. On track.
